title: thelypteris munda
intro: Thelypteris munda, also known as the mounded wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris munda include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and ulcers. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and poultices to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
